item.title: Murmur 1.0.0
item.description:
Murmur 1.0.0

First public release. Local-first dictation for macOS.

  • Seven-tab Settings window (General, Recording, Vocabulary, Prompts, Models, Updates, About)
  • Opt-in History viewer with search, copy, re-paste, delete
  • Vocabulary editor with JSON import/export
  • Four cleanup profiles: Raw, Casual, Formal, Code
  • Five Whisper model sizes downloadable in-app
  • Six-step onboarding wizard on first launch
  • Sparkle in-app updates

Note: This 1.0.0 build is ad-hoc-signed. A Developer-ID-signed and notarized DMG will land in 1.0.1.
